title: User Selects Multiple Requirements and Generates a Combined Test Case Set
description: Verifies that a user can select multiple requirements simultaneously and generate a consolidated set of test cases covering all selected requirements.
expected_result: The system generates a combined set of structured test cases that cover both the 'User Registration' and 'Email Verification' requirements. Each test case is clearly associated with its source requirement.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generator page
test_steps.expected: Test case generator page is displayed

test_steps.action: Check the requirement checkbox for 'User Registration'
Check the requirement checkbox for 'Email Verification'
Click the Generate Test Cases button
Wait for the results panel to appear
test_steps.expected: Results panel is displayed with test cases

test_steps.action: Verify that generated test cases reference both selected requirements
test_steps.expected: Test cases are tagged with both 'User Registration' and 'Email Verification'
